title: Jirniy's pink stuff
description: A small (primarily) cherry grove expansion mod :3
body:
> This mod is deprecated and no longer will be continued or updated to newest versions due to lack of ideas and difficulties porting to new updates.
> It will remain open source. Anyone has full rights to create a mod based off of this and expand/continue it as they wish.

A small content mod I made as mostly practice so don't expect too much!

Mainly focuses on the cherry grove biome but has some features outside of it

**Additions**:
- 1 new dimension with 11 biomes :3
- Over **200** items and blocks
- - 12 armor trims and 11 materials
- - 6 gear sets
- - 7 wood types
- - 2 crafting blocks
- 15 structures
- 6 entities
- 2 villager profession
- advancement tree
- some minor QoL additions, intended to make some less useful items more accessible 

**This Mod has not been verified for compatibility with other mods!~**
Will only be maintained for the latest versions, will not receive any updates for older Minecraft versions and without any plans to backport

There will be new additions over time :3 

Source code and report bugs are available on the [github](https://github.com/jirniyuwu/pink-stuff) page (Some features are experimental so any feedback will be appreciated!)

utilizes [custom portal API](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi) for custom portal handling (uses a [fork for 1.21.11](https://github.com/DaFuqs/customportalapi/) because the original repository hasnt been updated to 1.21.9+)

This mod has also been made possible with the help of [Kaupenjoe fabric 1.21 tutorials](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKGarocXCE1H_HxOYihQMq0mlpqiUJj4L), altho I added some new _(not particularly original)_ features on my own :3c
